templates.name: Matter Onboarding Reminder
templates.description: Sends notification to complete the onboarding checklist when a client transitions to ONBOARDING status

actionConfig.title: Complete onboarding: {{customer.name}}
actionConfig.message: Client {{customer.name}} has entered the onboarding phase. Please complete the onboarding checklist, including FICA verification, conflict check, and engagement letter.

templates.name: Engagement Letter Follow-up
templates.description: Creates a follow-up task when an engagement letter (proposal) is sent to the client

actionConfig.title: Follow up on engagement letter: {{customer.name}}
actionConfig.description: The engagement letter for {{customer.name}} was sent. Follow up to confirm receipt and obtain signed copy.
